required_preferences.fact: Practices keynote and panel presentations out loud with live audience feedback sessions—avoids silent solo review before major industry events to build confidence and fluency

supersedes.fact: Reviews slide decks using silent practice and makes annotated notes the night before a big meeting—avoids out-loud rehearsal to minimize screen and wrist strain during recovery

required_preferences.fact: Spends most evenings in person with his girlfriend while she stays in Dallas—no longer relies on scheduled video calls or frequent texting to maintain connection

supersedes.fact: Video-calls his girlfriend every Thursday evening—never lets more than two days pass without at least texting
